6 - Weight Loss.mp4 This is Karen Abdallah, 57 years old, 206 pounds, struggling with hormone changes, depression, anxiety, aches and pains, migraines, insomnia. She couldn't stand looking at herself in the mirror. The excess weight was controlling Karen's life for years. The weight was piling on. and none of the diets she did worked. In fact, they only made things worse. exercise, cutting out carbs, counting calories, all left her defeated and hopeless. until she reset her metabolism. Here is Karen six months later, 70 pounds lighter, and she's easily keeping it off. Karen has her life back. She has the energy and body she had in her thirties. No more excess weight dragging her down. She's able to shop for clothes again in the back of her closet, play with her grandkids, and most importantly, get back to living the life that she wants. Andrew Canoon. And over the last 10 years, I've helped over 1,000 women over the ages of 45 to release the weight and keep it off for good. And it's not by dieting. You see, diets do not work. I've helped women by resetting their metabolisms and getting to the root cause of weight gain and ill health. See, losing weight in an inflamed, unhealthy body is simply impossible. If you're over 45 and you've tried every diet known to man, and you've maybe lost some weight but gained it back or worse, gained a block back plus interest, and now you're left frustrated, confused, exhausted, then there's still hope for you. I've put together a free training where I walk you through the exact strategy I've used with Karen and thousands of others. And you're going to uncover how inflammation, toxins, stress, and mindset have been preventing you from releasing this weight this whole time. And how to apply this simple, sustainable health-first approach. To finally release all the weight and get back to a life and health that you love, Melody Earl, 59 years old, did just that when she got off her medications and relieved her osteoarthritis pains. She is now down 75 pounds and living a completely different life that she never thought was possible. Here is Sarah Wilmot, 62 years old. She started working with me at 175 pounds. And within four and a half months, she released 50 pounds. She's now at 125 pounds, which is the weight she was when she got married.
